creator: ben@relops.com
text:
Created attachment 193069
Re-baselined patch for 5.1.3

This patch takes a review comment into account (https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/port-patch-request-wait-time.65725/#post-386433) and since Kamailio 5.1.3 has been released in the meantime, I re-baselined to 5.1.3.
